debug_to_file.name: $debugname
debug_to_file.text: 'Run for %s. restriction=%s, priority=%s, maxjumps %s, maxprice +%s%%, fulfill %s%%, maxwares %s, maxtrades %s, maxtrips %s, filltgt %s%%, mincargo %s%%, minleg %s%%, flushorders %s.'.[(if @$target then $target.knownname else 'null'), $sourceRestriction, $sourcePriority, $maxSourceJumps, $maxPriceAbovePct, $fulfillPercent, $maxWares, $maxTrades, $maxTripsPerShip, $fillTargetPct, $minCargoPct, $minLegPct, $flushExistingOrders]

do_if.value: @$off.ware and $off.ware.waretransport == waretransport.container and ($mode != 'virtual' or $syntheticoffers.indexof.{$off}) and (not @$cfg.$excludedWares or not $cfg.$excludedWares.indexof.{$off.ware})
@$st and $st != $target and not $st.ishostileto.{faction.player} and $st.gatedistance.{$target} ge 0 and $st.gatedistance.{$target} le $maxSourceJumps
@$so and $so.available and $so.amount gt 0 and ((@$so.quantityfactor + '') == 'null' or $so.quantityfactor le (100 + $maxPriceAbovePct) / 100.0)
$tripvol lt $fillTargetVol and $triptrades lt $maxTrades and $tripfree gt 0 and ($need.$cap - $need.$planned) gt 0 and ($intrip or $tripwares.count lt $maxWares)
$triptrades lt $maxTrades and $tripfree gt 0 and $tgtrem gt 0 and $tripvol lt $fillTargetVol

debug_to_file.name: $debugname
debug_to_file.text: ' %s round %s attempt [%s] underfilled (%s%% of cap) — rolled back, NOT queued.'.[$ship.idcode, $round, $strategy, (if $capacity gt 0 then ($tripvol * 100) / $capacity else 0)]

debug_to_file.name: $debugname
debug_to_file.text: ' %s round %s committed: %s wares, %s m3 (%s%% of %s).'.[$ship.idcode, $round, $tripwares.count, $tripvol, (if $capacity gt 0 then ($tripvol * 100) / $capacity else 0), $capacity]

do_if.value: not @$committed_at_least_once_ships_set.{$ship} and $ship.cargo.free.container lt $ship.cargo.capacity.container and ($ship.cargo.free.container le 0 or $ship.cargo.free.container lt ($ship.cargo.capacity.container * $minCargoPct) / 100)

param.name: Legs
param.comment: List of legs; each holds $station plus any other fields

param.name: Anchor
param.comment: Delivery target the route is anchored at

param.name: Ship
param.comment: Ship receiving its first committed planner trip

param.name: PreSellLegs
param.comment: Table of pre-sell legs by ship

param.name: FlushExistingOrders
param.comment: Cancel existing queued orders before adding planner orders

param.name: Ship
param.comment: Ship holding the cargo to sell

param.name: MaxJumps
param.comment: Max gate jumps from the ship to a buyer

param.name: Taken
param.comment: Table of amounts already planned per offer

do_if.value: @$o and @$o.buyer and $o.available and $o.amount gt 0 and not $o.buyer.ishostileto.{faction.player}
